2605.03510.title: Rational Communication Shapes Morphological Composition
2605.03510.paper_summary: Human languages expand vocabularies by combining existing morphemes rather than inventing arbitrary forms. Communicative efficiency shapes lexical systems at multiple levels (Gibson et al., 2019), yet morphological composition -- combining morphemes through compounding or affixation -- has rarely been modeled as a historically situated speaker choice among competing morpheme sequences, leaving unanswered why a language settles on one morpheme combination over other plausible alternatives. We ask whether a trade-off between listener recoverability and speaker production cost can predict attested compositions over contemporaneously available alternatives. Here we show, within the Rational Speech Act (RSA) framework (Frank & Goodman, 2012; Goodman & Frank, 2016) using a time-indexed lexicon constructed from Corpus of Historical American English (COHA) and Corpus of Contemporary American English (COCA), that across 4323 naturally occurring English compounds and derivations spanning 1820--2019, attested compositions are systematically ranked above unattested alternatives generated from contemporaneously available morphemes. Models integrating semantic informativeness with production cost outperform semantic-only and cost-only baselines on Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) and top-k accuracy (Acc@k), with the advantage of the Pragmatic Speaker model ($S_1$) over the semantic-only baseline growing as the candidate set expands, where meaning alone leaves morphological choice underdetermined. These findings suggest that lexicalization reflects a communicative trade-off between expressiveness and efficiency, extending rational accounts of communication from utterance-level choice to the internal structure of words.
2605.03510.paper_summary_zh: 人類語言透過結合現有的語素來擴展詞彙，而不是發明任意的形式。<lb/>交際效率在多個層面上塑造詞彙系統（Gibson et al., 2019），然而形態組合——通過合成或附加來結合語素——卻很少被建模為歷史上位於競爭語素序列之間的說話者選擇，這使得為什麼一種語言會選擇某一語素組合而非其他可行替代品的問題仍未解答。<lb/>我們詢問聽者可恢復性與說話者產出成本之間的權衡是否可以預測已證實的組合相對於當時可用的替代品。<lb/>在這裡，我們展示了在理性言語行為（RSA）框架內（Frank & Goodman, 2012; Goodman & Frank, 2016），使用從美國歷史語料庫（COHA）和當代美國語料庫（COCA）構建的時間索引詞彙，對於4323個自然發生的英語合成詞和派生詞，跨越1820年至2019年，已證實的組合系統性地高於從當時可用的語素生成的未證實替代品。<lb/>整合語義信息性與產出成本的模型在平均倒數排名（MRR）和前k準確度（Acc@k）上超越了僅基於語義和僅基於成本的基準，隨著候選集的擴展，語用說話者模型（$S_1$）相對於僅基於語義的基準的優勢也在增長，而僅僅依賴意義則使形態選擇未被充分確定。<lb/>這些發現表明，詞彙化反映了表達性與效率之間的交際權衡，將理性溝通的解釋從話語層級的選擇擴展到單詞的內部結構。
2605.03510.author: Fengyuan Yang et.al.
2605.03510.authors: Fengyuan Yang, Yongqian Peng, Yuxi Ma, Chenheng Xu, Yixin Zhu
